input.content:
[user]What does trapped mean?
[Ninereeds]Trapped describes something that is caught and unable to escape.
Mouse is trapped. Bird is trapped. Fox is trapped.
Water is not trapped. Wind is not trapped. Smoke is not trapped.

[user]What does warm-blooded mean?
[Ninereeds]Warm-blooded describes an animal that maintains a constant body temperature.
Mammals are warm-blooded. Humans are warm-blooded. Dogs are warm-blooded.
Reptiles are not warm-blooded. Amphibians are not warm-blooded. Fish are not warm-blooded.
